/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc  -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -Wall -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -fstack-usage -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -Wall -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -fstack-usage -O0 -g3 -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -T "/home/luka/Documents/Zero_copy_embedded_pub_or_sub_system/Zero-copy-Embedded-Pub-Sub-System/FreeRTOS_TETS/STM32F407XX_FLASH.ld" --specs=nano.specs -Wl,-Map=FreeRTOS_TETS.map -Wl,--gc-sections
